emails.subject: Need help checking application logs
emails.body:
Hey Alice,

We've been getting some alerts from our monitoring system about one of our apps. Could you take a look at the application logs for app1 and app2 in the logs directory? I need to know which one is throwing errors so I can prioritize the fix.

The logs should be in /logs - just check app1.log and app2.log and let me know which one has ERROR messages.

Thanks for your help!
Bob
